provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human male station commander in his late 60s on his final tour, wearing a navy bridge coat that has been recut twice to fit his changing frame over forty years, tarnished gold shoulder boards and cuff rings that he has stopped polishing, a leather document case so old the stitching has been re-done by hand, the coat has a small moth hole near the hem that he has not bothered to fix, comfortable broken-in boots, everything about him says tired authority
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Retiring commander in navy jacket with gold trim, by rusted ship door. Tired authority. The worn gold and aged face tell the story.
